title: Understanding Selling Music Online and Accepting Bitcoin: A Plain-Language Breakdown — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're a talented musician in Kenya, but you can't take advantage of popular platforms like PayPal or Stripe due to strict geo-restrictions. Every time you try to sell your music online, you're met with a 'payment method not available' wall. Your passion and creativity are being held back by outdated technology and restrictive payment processors. You're not alone, and this guide is here to help you break free from these limitations and unlock your full earning potential.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling music online is a complex process that involves more than just uploading your tracks to a platform. It requires a secure and reliable way to accept payments from fans and customers all over the world. The good news is that there are alternative solutions available, like NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle. These tools enable creators like you to sell digital products, including music, without relying on traditional payment processors. This means you can focus on what you do best – creating music – while Unchained Commerce handles the technical details.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

At its core, the technology behind selling music online involves the use of blockchain and cryptocurrency. When a customer buys your music, the transaction is recorded on a public ledger (the blockchain) in real-time. This ensures that the transaction is secure, transparent, and irreversible. Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle comes with Web3 Wallet Connect, which allows customers to make payments using their preferred cryptocurrency. This means you can accept payments in multiple currencies, including Bitcoin, and convert them into USD at the time of transaction.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is designed specifically for digital creators like you who face geo-restrictions or other limitations when trying to sell their music online. Whether you're a solo artist or part of a collective, this bundle offers a powerful solution that helps you reach a global audience and get paid for your work. By using NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's technology, you can tap into a vast and growing market of music fans who are eager to support emerging artists like you.
Don't let geo-restrictions hold you back from selling your music online.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle consists of three main components: Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. Core Shop Engine handles the automated delivery of your music files, while Web3 Wallet Connect enables customers to make secure payments using their preferred cryptocurrency. Admin Dashboard provides you with a user-friendly interface to manage orders, track analytics, and update your store settings. When used together, these components create a seamless and efficient music-selling experience that helps you maximize your earnings and grow your fanbase.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand the basics of selling music online and accepting Bitcoin, it's time to take action. Start by setting up Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle on your website or online store. Next, create a unique music store and configure your payment settings to accept Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. Finally, promote your music and store to your fans and customers, and start selling your music online with confidence and security. By following these simple steps, you can unlock your full earning potential and turn your passion into a sustainable career.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Selling music online is a complex process, but Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle makes it easy.

Additionally, our Full Stack Bundle is designed to work seamlessly with NOWPayments, so you can start selling your music online today.
Your Action Checklist

Here's a checklist to help you get started with selling your music online and accepting Bitcoin using Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle: Set up your music store and configure payment settings. Promote your music and store to your fans and customers. Use Web3 Wallet Connect to enable secure cryptocurrency payments. Monitor and update your store settings regularly. Focus on creating high-quality music that resonates with your audience. Engage with your fans and build a loyal community around your music.
By using cryptocurrency, you can accept payments from fans and customers all over the world.
